name: What is he doing? (Webhook Logger)
description: Sends optional notifications based on your actions to a Discord webhook you configure.

profile-manager.name: Profile Manager
profile-manager.description: Save and load snapshots of mod settings across 10 renamed slots. Loading applies values immediately and closes open settings popups so they stick.

webhook-url.name: Webhook URL
webhook-url.description: HTTPS Discord webhook URL. Outbound messages are disabled only when this URL and every Extra Webhook URL below are empty.

webhook-username.name: Webhook Display Name
webhook-username.description: If set, overrides the webhook bot name on each message. Leave empty to use the name configured for this webhook in Discord (Server Settings -> Integrations).

test-webhook.name: Send Test Webhook
test-webhook.description: Enable and apply to send a test message (then resets).

max-retries.name: Max Webhook Retries
max-retries.description: How many times to retry sending after a failed attempt.

blocking-webhook.name: Blocking request on exit (READ DESCRIPTION)
blocking-webhook.description: YOU DON'T NEED THIS UNLESS YOU'RE HAVING ISSUES WITH IT NOT SENDING ON EXIT. If enabled, the "Closed Geometry Dash" message uses a blocking request so it is more likely to finish before the process ends. Can freeze the game for up to several tens of seconds in worst case. Not used for any other notification.

player-name.name: Player Name
player-name.description: Name shown in each message. Empty uses "He".

notify-game-session.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting Geometry Dash
notify-game-session.description: Log when the game is opened and closed. Exit time is included in the close message if enabled.

notify-play-level.name: Notify on Playing/Exiting a Level
notify-play-level.description: Log when a level is started and when the run is exited, including time in the level.

notify-level-complete.name: Notify on Level Complete
notify-level-complete.description: Log when a run completes and include time on that run.

notify-new-best.name: Notify on New Best
notify-new-best.description: Log when you achieve a new best on a level.

new-best-min-percent.name: Minimum New Best Percent
new-best-min-percent.description: Skip new best notifications below this percent. Set to 0 to send every new best.

notify-editor.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting the Editor
notify-editor.description: Log when the editor is opened and when you leave the editor (save and play, save and exit, exit without save).

notify-level-upload.name: Notify on Level Upload
notify-level-upload.description: Log when you upload a new level

upload-send-on-update.name: Send on Level Update
upload-send-on-update.description: Also send a notification when you update an existing level

upload-use-custom-text.name: Use Custom Text
upload-use-custom-text.description: Use your own message template instead of the default embed. Template file is customtextprofile1.txt through customtextprofile10.txt (see Manage Profiles). Slot 1 is used until you Load a profile from the manager, which switches which file is edited and used.

upload-open-custom-text.name: Custom Text
upload-open-custom-text.description: Opens the active template file (customtextprofile1.txt ... customtextprofile10.txt) in your mod config folder. Load a profile in Manage Profiles to change which slot is active. Variables: {creator}, {name}, {id}, {lengh}, {objects}, {role}, {isUploaded"text"}, {isUpdated"text"}

upload-role-ping.name: Role Ping
upload-role-ping.description: Ping a role when a level is uploaded

upload-role-id.name: Role ID
upload-role-id.description: The Discord role ID to ping. In the preset this appears spoilered at the bottom. In custom text, place {role} wherever you want it!

screenshot-level-complete.name: Screenshot on Level Complete
screenshot-level-complete.description: Attach a screen capture to level complete webhooks (including practice and startpos segment completes).

screenshot-new-best.name: Screenshot on New Best
screenshot-new-best.description: Attach a screen capture to new best webhooks.

screenshot-death.name: Screenshot on Death
screenshot-death.description: Attach a screen capture to death webhooks (normal and startpos runs).

screenshot-scale-percent.name: Screenshot PNG Scale
screenshot-scale-percent.description: Output size as percent of captured resolution. Lower values means smaller PNGs and uploads.

notify-death.name: Notify on Death
notify-death.description: Normal mode only. Startpos: minimum segment, start-end percentage line. Skips when New Best already covers that death.

cheat-detect.name: Detect Cheat/Noclip Runs
cheat-detect.description: Suppress progress webhooks when noclip, ignore damage, or speedhack is detected.

death-min-percent.name: Minimum Death Percent
death-min-percent.description: Skip death notifications below this percent. Set to 0 to send every death.

startpos-death-min-progress.name: Minimum Startpos Progress Percent
startpos-death-min-progress.description: Minimum percentage points from that start to your death. Set to 0 to send every startpos death.

level-filter-mode.name: Level ID Filter Mode
level-filter-mode.description: All = send normally. Blacklist = redact identifying info (level name, creator, ID) for IDs in the list. Whitelist = redact for IDs NOT in the list.

level-filter-ids.name: Level IDs (comma-separated)
level-filter-ids.description: Use the toggle button on the level info page to add/remove levels. Or do it the old way by making a list in a note app and copy pasting it here. It will automatically filter out text for you too (e.g. "1 Stereo Madness, 2 Back On Track" -> "1, 2").

suppress-redacted.name: Don't Send Redacted Messages
suppress-redacted.description: When on, any level message that would otherwise be sent as "Private level" (because of the filter mode above) is dropped entirely instead of sent. Use this for full privacy on filtered levels. Affects level start, exit, complete, death, new best, and editor open/exit.

color-game-open.name: Game Opened
color-game-open.description: Embed accent color for the "Opened Geometry Dash" webhook.

color-game-close.name: Game Closed
color-game-close.description: Embed accent color for the "Closed Geometry Dash" webhook.

color-test-webhook.name: Test Webhook
color-test-webhook.description: Embed accent color for the "Test Webhook" message sent when the Test Webhook setting is triggered.

color-editor-open.name: Editor Opened
color-editor-open.description: Embed accent color for opening the editor ("Opened the Editor") and for the default "New Level Uploaded".

color-editor-exit.name: Editor Exited
color-editor-exit.description: Embed accent color when leaving the editor (Save and Play, exit with/without save, etc.) and for the default "Level Updated".

color-new-best.name: New Best
color-new-best.description: Embed accent color for the "New Best!" webhook (new normal-mode best percent below 100%, after thresholds in settings).

color-level-complete.name: Level Complete
color-level-complete.description: Embed accent color for normal-mode "Level Complete!" and startpos test-mode "Startpos Complete!". Practice completes use Practice Run instead.

color-level-exit.name: Level Exited
color-level-exit.description: Embed accent color when exiting a normal-mode run from the pause menu and endscreen ("Exited a Level"). Practice exits use Practice Run.

color-death.name: Death
color-death.description: Embed accent color for "Died" webhooks (single percent or startpos segment).

color-play-practice.name: Practice Run
color-play-practice.description: Embed accent color for practice completion, pause-menu exit while in practice and endscreen exit after completing a practice run.

color-play-normal.name: Normal Run
color-play-normal.description: Embed accent color for the "Playing a Level" webhook.

extra-webhook-url-1.name: Extra Webhook URL 1
extra-webhook-url-1.description: Optional HTTPS Discord webhook URL. Empty is ignored. Each notification is sent to the main Webhook URL and every non-empty extra URL.

extra-webhook-url-2.name: Extra Webhook URL 2
extra-webhook-url-2.description: Optional HTTPS Discord webhook URL. Empty is ignored. Each notification is sent to the main Webhook URL and every non-empty extra URL.

extra-webhook-url-3.name: Extra Webhook URL 3
extra-webhook-url-3.description: Optional HTTPS Discord webhook URL. Empty is ignored. Each notification is sent to the main Webhook URL and every non-empty extra URL.

extra-webhook-url-4.name: Extra Webhook URL 4
extra-webhook-url-4.description: Optional HTTPS Discord webhook URL. Empty is ignored. Each notification is sent to the main Webhook URL and every non-empty extra URL.
